description: A customer needs to reschedule their ziplining tour from Saturday to Sunday.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's original booking for the ziplining tour.
Check for availability on the tour for the new date (Sunday).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms there are open spots on Sunday.

nodes.task_description: Modify the booking to the new date and send an updated confirmation to the customer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully reschedules the tour and provides a new confirmation.
